channel.title: Bhavesh Panjala
channel.description: CS Graduate • Spring Boot Developer • DSA Enthusiast

item.title: Why Every Developer Should Learn Data Structures and Algorithms
item.description: DSA is more than interview prep — it shapes how you think about problems, write efficient code, and build better software.

item.title: My Competitive Programming Journey: Tips and Strategies
item.description: Lessons from grinding Codeforces and LeetCode — how competitive programming sharpened my problem-solving skills and what I wish I knew earlier.

item.title: Building REST APIs with Spring Boot: A Practical Guide
item.description: A hands-on guide to building clean, production-ready REST APIs with Spring Boot — covering project structure, best practices, and common patterns.

item.title: System Design 101: How to Think About Scalable Systems
item.description: A beginner-friendly introduction to system design concepts — from load balancers to databases, caching, and message queues.
